caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair styled in a bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a podcast studio. She is positioned in profile, facing left toward a professional black microphone. In the background, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and a sign reads "Employee Only." To the right, a logo featuring red and white text reads "BOSS TALK 101," accompanied by smaller text that says "Kr. 11 logo cloth." Another logo for "PODCAST" is visible on the left. Across the frames, the woman remains in the same position, though her facial expression shifts slightly as she looks toward the microphone, appearing to be listening or preparing to speak. The lighting and the arrangement of the equipment remain constant throughout the sequence.
